query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS network_subscriptions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  networkMemberId INT NOT NULL,
  subscriptionType ENUM('monthly', 'annual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly',
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  periodStart DATE NOT NULL,
  periodEnd DATE NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'paid', 'overdue', 'cancelled', 'refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(100),
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(100),
  paidAt DATETIME,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  networkMemberId INT NOT NULL,
  subscriptionType ENUM('monthly', 'annual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly',
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,

  status ENUM('pending', 'paid', 'overdue', 'cancelled', 'refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(100),
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(100),
  paidAt DATETIME,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
